text:
AUDIT layout consistency in an Expo Router app at '/Users/mikhail/Documents/CURSOR CODES/In Progress/backfire'. Scope: main app screens app/(app)/*.tsx (NOT the play/ subfolder), app/(auth)/*.tsx, and root screens app/index.tsx, app/terms.tsx, app/privacy.tsx, app/how-to-play.tsx. For EACH screen record concretely: 1) safe-area handling (SafeAreaView vs useSafeAreaInsets vs none, which edges), 2) horizontal padding value used and whether it comes from SPACING.screenPadding / LAYOUT.screenGutter in constants/theme.ts or a hardcoded number, 3) whether content max-width (LAYOUT.contentMaxWidth=560) is applied on wide screens, 4) scroll handling (ScrollView with contentContainerStyle? plain View? KeyboardAvoidingView?), 5) header pattern (custom back button? Stack header? inline title style), 6) background color source, 7) hardcoded fontSize/color instead of TYPE_SCALE/COLORS tokens, 8) shared scaffold components used (components/ScreenContent.tsx, LegalScrollScreen.tsx etc). Output a compact markdown table per screen plus a ranked list of the top inconsistencies (what differs, which screens, which pattern is the majority/best to standardize on). Read constants/theme.ts first to know the tokens. Do NOT edit anything.

content.thinking:
Checking whether the store header gets gutter padding.

Store header lacks horizontal padding while scroll content uses screenGutter. Home index uses hardcoded 8px grid padding and 880px max width instead of layout constants. Auth screens default to full safe area edges and hardcode 400px card width rather than 560px.

Game-recap uses palette colors and SPACING.lg padding without ScreenContent or LAYOUT.screenGutter. Rules and lobby-settings apply SPACING.lg horizontal padding. Create-game uses SPACING.lg in its header and places body content inside step components. Theme-picker, content-languages, and language-picker use SPACING.lg or SPACING.xl for body padding. Horizontal padding is inconsistent across screens.

SPACING.lg appears on create-game headers, theme-picker headers, and content-languages headers, while its body uses SPACING.xl. SPACING.xl appears on game headers and game-recap content. The game board and modals skip horizontal padding entirely. Most screens use fullWidth=true, bypassing ScreenContent's 560px default. AuthCard hardcodes 400px, home contentFrame uses 880px, web uses 1250px, and game questionPanel caps at 600px.

Language-picker descriptions cap at 420px, while content-languages descriptions and theme or settings modals cap at 720px. Safe area handling is split: home, store, settings, how-to-play, and legal explicitly set all four edges, whereas auth, game-recap, rules, lobby-settings, create-game, theme-picker, game, content-languages, and language-picker rely on default SafeAreaView behavior.

ScrollView wraps auth, store, settings, game-recap, theme-picker, content-languages, how-to-play, and legal. Plain View covers home, rules, lobby-settings, create-game, and game. Home may overflow since it lacks a scroll container. Language-picker scrolls horizontally for locales but not vertically for its body. Create-game steps scroll internally. Header patterns differ by screen: GameHeader appears only on home, while store, settings, create-game, theme-picker, language-picker, and content-languages use a three-column back-title-chip layout.

text: Creating the audit report from the gathered screen data.

content.thinking:
I have gathered enough information to write the comprehensive audit.

I am creating the output directory and writing the markdown audit. The file will cover 18 screens across the app and auth routes.

The audit reveals three ranked UI inconsistencies. Color sources split between palette-aware theme hooks and static canvas values. Content widths ignore the 560px layout constant. Horizontal padding mixes gutter sizes without a unified standard.

content.text: Creating the audit report from the gathered screen data.

text: (no output)

content.text: (no output)

text:
Layout audit is done. Full report: `.pi-subagents/artifacts/outputs/43f2c386/.pi-subagents/artifacts/outputs/audit-main-screens.md`

**18 screens audited** (including redirect-only `app/index.tsx`).

**Top inconsistencies:**
1. **Background source** — most screens use `HOME_SOFT_UI.canvas`; `game-recap`, `how-to-play`, and legal use `useTheme().background`
2. **`LAYOUT.contentMaxWidth` (560) unused** — `ScreenContent` is always `fullWidth`; `AuthCard` uses 400; home uses 880/1250
3. **Horizontal padding** — mix of `LAYOUT.screenGutter` (16), `SPACING.xl` (24), hardcoded 8; `SPACING.screenPadding` (20) is never used
4. **Partial `ScreenContent` adoption** — home/store/settings/how-to-play/legal yes; auth, pickers, modals, game no
5. **Safe-area edges** — explicit on 5 screens; implicit default on the rest
6. **6+ header patterns** — no shared header component beyond `GameHeader` on home

**Best reference:** `app/(app)/store.tsx` — explicit edges, `ScreenContent fullWidth`, header outside scroll, `LAYOUT.screenGutter` on scroll content.

```acceptance-report
{
  "criteriaSatisfied": [
    {
      "id": "criterion-1",
      "status": "satisfied",
      "evidence": "Per-screen markdown table with 8 layout dimensions for 18 scoped screens; ranked inconsistency list with affected screens and recommended standard; file paths and line-range citations in audit-main-screens.md"
    }
  ],
  "changedFiles": [
    ".pi-subagents/artifacts/outputs/43f2c386/.pi-subagents/artifacts/outputs/audit-main-screens.md"
  ],
  "testsAddedOrUpdated": [],
  "commandsRun": [
    {
      "command": "mkdir -p .pi-subagents/artifacts/outputs/43f2c386/.pi-subagents/artifacts/outputs",
      "result": "passed",
      "summary": "Created output directory for audit artifact"
    }
  ],
  "validationOutput": [
    "Read-only audit: 18 screen files, ScreenContent.tsx, LegalScrollScreen.tsx, AuthCard.tsx, theme.ts, landscapeStack.ts inspected via grep and targeted reads"
  ],
  "residualRisks": [
    "create-game step internals (features/lobby/*) have their own padding/scroll — not fully audited beyond screen shell",
    "Home hub has no ScrollView; overflow on small landscape heights not verified at runtime"
  ],
  "noStagedFiles": true,
  "diffSummary": "Added layout consistency audit markdown artifact only; no app source edits",
  "reviewFindings": [
    "high: LAYOUT.contentMaxWidth (560) defined but unused on all audited screens; AuthCard hardcodes 400",
    "high: HOME_SOFT_UI.canvas vs useTheme().background split across screen families",
    "medium: SPACING.screenPadding (20) unused; SPACING.xl (24) used as horizontal pad on game/theme-picker/content-languages",
```

content.text:
Layout audit is done. Full report: `.pi-subagents/artifacts/outputs/43f2c386/.pi-subagents/artifacts/outputs/audit-main-screens.md`

**18 screens audited** (including redirect-only `app/index.tsx`).

**Top inconsistencies:**
1. **Background source** — most screens use `HOME_SOFT_UI.canvas`; `game-recap`, `how-to-play`, and legal use `useTheme().background`
2. **`LAYOUT.contentMaxWidth` (560) unused** — `ScreenContent` is always `fullWidth`; `AuthCard` uses 400; home uses 880/1250
3. **Horizontal padding** — mix of `LAYOUT.screenGutter` (16), `SPACING.xl` (24), hardcoded 8; `SPACING.screenPadding` (20) is never used
4. **Partial `ScreenContent` adoption** — home/store/settings/how-to-play/legal yes; auth, pickers, modals, game no
5. **Safe-area edges** — explicit on 5 screens; implicit default on the rest
6. **6+ header patterns** — no shared header component beyond `GameHeader` on home

**Best reference:** `app/(app)/store.tsx` — explicit edges, `ScreenContent fullWidth`, header outside scroll, `LAYOUT.screenGutter` on scroll content.
